test_cases.title: Project agent file discovered from .pi/agents/
test_cases.description: Place an agent .md file in project's .pi/agents/ dir, verify AgentRegistry.resolve() returns it

test_cases.title: npm package agent discovered from node_modules
test_cases.description: Agent files in installed npm package's agents/ directory are discovered

test_cases.title: Priority override: project agent wins over package agent
test_cases.description: Same-name agent in project path overrides npm package version
steps: verify filePath points to project version

test_cases.title: Files starting with _ are skipped
test_cases.description: Agent files with _ prefix are not discovered

test_cases.title: .chain.md files are skipped
test_cases.description: Files ending with .chain.md are not discovered as agents

test_cases.title: No frontmatter: filename used as agent name
test_cases.description: Agent .md file without YAML frontmatter uses filename as name
steps: verify name is 'bare' and systemPrompt is full file content

test_cases.title: agent({ agent: 'name' }) injects systemPrompt
test_cases.description: Calling agent() with agent name resolves and injects systemPrompt via --append-system-prompt
steps: run workflow script with agent({ agent: 'review-taste', prompt: 'test' })

test_cases.title: Agent model used as default
test_cases.description: When agent has model in frontmatter and no opts.model, agent.model is used
steps: ensure agent with model: ds-flash exists

test_cases.title: opts.model overrides agent.model
test_cases.description: Explicit opts.model takes precedence over agent frontmatter model
steps: ensure agent with model: ds-flash exists

test_cases.title: Agent not found returns error
test_cases.description: Non-existent agent name returns structured error
steps: verify result has success: false and error containing 'Agent not found'

test_cases.title: Old agent('string') syntax unaffected
test_cases.description: Legacy string-only agent() call works without any agent discovery
steps: verify pi subprocess runs normally without --append-system-prompt

test_cases.title: Temp file cleaned up after subprocess exits
test_cases.description: System prompt temp file is deleted after agent call completes
steps: capture temp file path from logs
verify file does not exist after call completes

test_cases.title: npm pack includes agents directory
test_cases.description: package.json files field includes agents/ and npm pack includes it
steps: verify package.json has 'agents/' in files array
